properties.name: upstream.provider
properties.description: Upstream network adapter: wiremock (dev), visa, mastercard.

properties.name: hsm.pkcs11.library
properties.description: Path to the PKCS#11 shared library (e.g. libsofthsm2.so).

properties.name: hsm.pkcs11.bdk-alias
properties.description: Key alias for the Base Derivation Key (DUKPT).

properties.name: hsm.pkcs11.zpk-alias
properties.description: Key alias for the Zone PIN Key.

properties.name: hsm.pkcs11.mak-alias
properties.description: Key alias for the Message Authentication Key.

properties.name: cors.allowed-origins
properties.description: Comma-separated CORS allowed origins for REST endpoints.

properties.name: npci.callback.api-key
properties.description: NPCI UPI callback auth key; blank = check skipped in dev.

properties.name: iso8583.port
properties.description: TCP port for the ISO 8583 Netty server.

properties.name: qr.session.ttl-minutes
properties.description: Redis TTL for dynamic QR sessions in minutes.
